steps.title: Find the key signal
steps.content: The crucial phrase in the claim is “to the exclusion of all other qualities” — Joanna values ambitious people while dismissing everything else entirely. Look for evidence showing she cares about a single quality but has zero interest in anything else.

steps.title: Match the meaning
steps.content:
"Joanna was mightily interested in people who had a 'purpose' in life. Otherwise not at all." demonstrates this with “Joanna was mightily interested in people who had a 'purpose' in life.

Otherwise not at all.” The phrase “Otherwise not at all” shows she cares only about ambition and completely excludes all other qualities.

The other choices either state a preference without justifying it, mention ambition alongside other valued traits, or discuss unrelated abilities.

That matches the correct answer — A is correct.
